description: Monthly base rent of $42,500.00 due on the 1st of each month. Payments must be received by 5:00 PM EST.
due_date: 1st of every month
penalty_if_missed: Late fee of 5% ($2,125) if received after the 5th; additional 1.5% per month interest on outstanding balance
source_clause: SECTION 3.1: Base Rent shall be payable in advance on the first day of each calendar month. If Tenant fails to pay any installment of Base Rent within five (5) days after the due date, Tenant shall pay a late charge equal to five percent (5%) of the overdue amount.

description: Annual rent escalation of 3% on each anniversary of the Commencement Date (January 1, 2025).
due_date: January 1 of each year — next increase: January 1, 2026
penalty_if_missed: Landlord may invoice retroactively with interest at 8% per annum
source_clause: SECTION 3.3: Commencing on the first anniversary of the Commencement Date and on each anniversary thereafter, the monthly Base Rent shall increase by three percent (3%) over the immediately preceding year's Base Rent.

description: Tenant must maintain Commercial General Liability insurance with minimum coverage of $2,000,000 per occurrence and $5,000,000 aggregate.
due_date: Continuous — certificate due within 10 days of each renewal
penalty_if_missed: Landlord may obtain coverage at Tenant's expense plus 15% administrative surcharge; default under lease
source_clause: SECTION 5.2: Tenant shall maintain Commercial General Liability Insurance with limits of not less than Two Million Dollars ($2,000,000) per occurrence and Five Million Dollars ($5,000,000) in the aggregate, naming Landlord as additional insured.

description: Maintain property insurance covering Tenant's personal property and improvements at full replacement cost value.
due_date: Continuous — renewal certificate within 10 days of expiration
penalty_if_missed: $1,000 per day coverage lapses; Landlord may place coverage at Tenant's expense
source_clause: SECTION 5.3: Tenant shall maintain property insurance on a special form basis covering all of Tenant's personal property, trade fixtures, and Tenant Improvements at their full replacement cost value.

description: Tenant responsible for all interior maintenance including HVAC filters, lighting, plumbing fixtures, and interior glass.
due_date: HVAC filter replacement: quarterly (March, June, September, December)
penalty_if_missed: Landlord may perform and charge Tenant cost plus 20% overhead
source_clause: SECTION 6.1: Tenant shall, at Tenant's sole cost and expense, maintain the Premises in good order, condition and repair, including but not limited to HVAC filters (quarterly), interior lighting, plumbing fixtures, and interior glass.

description: Tenant must comply with all applicable ADA requirements within the Premises at Tenant's sole cost.
due_date: Ongoing — any required modifications within 60 days of notice
penalty_if_missed: Tenant indemnifies Landlord for all fines, penalties, and legal costs arising from non-compliance
source_clause: SECTION 6.4: Tenant shall, at Tenant's sole expense, comply with all requirements of the Americans with Disabilities Act and all other applicable laws, codes, and regulations pertaining to the Premises and Tenant's use thereof.

description: Written notice of intent to renew must be delivered no later than 180 days prior to lease expiration (December 31, 2029).
due_date: July 4, 2029 — 180 days before December 31, 2029
penalty_if_missed: Renewal option deemed waived; Landlord free to re-let the Premises
source_clause: SECTION 7.2: Tenant's renewal option shall be exercised, if at all, by written notice to Landlord given no later than one hundred eighty (180) days prior to the expiration of the then-current Term.

description: No alterations, additions, or improvements exceeding $10,000 may be made without prior written consent of Landlord.
due_date: Submit request minimum 30 days before planned commencement
penalty_if_missed: Landlord may require removal and restoration at Tenant's expense plus $15,000 penalty per unauthorized alteration
source_clause: SECTION 8.1: Tenant shall not make any alterations, additions or improvements to the Premises costing in excess of Ten Thousand Dollars ($10,000) without the prior written consent of Landlord, which shall not be unreasonably withheld.

description: Tenant shall indemnify and hold Landlord harmless from all claims arising from Tenant's use of the Premises, with minimum indemnification cap of $10,000,000.
due_date: Notice of claim within 15 business days of occurrence
penalty_if_missed: Waiver of indemnification rights for claims not timely reported
source_clause: SECTION 9.1: Tenant shall indemnify, defend, protect and hold harmless Landlord from and against any and all claims, actions, damages, liability and expense in connection with loss of life, personal injury or damage to property arising from Tenant's use of the Premises.

description: Tenant must provide audited financial statements to Landlord within 90 days of fiscal year end.
due_date: 90 days after fiscal year end — March 31 annually
penalty_if_missed: $500 per day after deadline; Landlord may declare default after 30 days
source_clause: SECTION 10.2: Within ninety (90) days after the end of each fiscal year of Tenant, Tenant shall deliver to Landlord a copy of Tenant's audited financial statements for such fiscal year, certified by an independent certified public accountant.

description: Tenant must obtain and maintain all permits and licenses required for its business operations within 30 days of lease commencement.
due_date: January 30, 2025 — and ongoing renewals
penalty_if_missed: Lease default; Landlord may terminate with 10 days written notice
source_clause: SECTION 11.1: Tenant shall, at its sole cost and expense, obtain and keep in force during the Term all permits, licenses, and approvals required for the conduct of Tenant's business at the Premises.

description: Early termination requires 12 months written notice and payment of termination fee equal to 6 months base rent ($255,000).
due_date: 12 months advance written notice required
penalty_if_missed: Termination fee increases to 9 months base rent ($382,500) if notice is less than 6 months
source_clause: SECTION 12.3: Tenant may terminate this Lease effective as of the end of the fifth (5th) Lease Year by delivering written notice to Landlord not less than twelve (12) months prior to such termination date, together with a termination fee equal to six (6) months of the then-current Base Rent.

description: All lease terms and conditions are confidential. Neither party may disclose financial terms without prior written consent.
due_date: Ongoing — survives lease termination for 3 years
penalty_if_missed: $50,000 liquidated damages per unauthorized disclosure
source_clause: SECTION 13.1: The terms and conditions of this Lease are confidential. Neither party shall disclose the financial terms of this Lease to any third party without the prior written consent of the other party. Violation: $50,000 liquidated damages per occurrence.

description: Tenant must maintain premises at minimum 85% occupancy. Sustained occupancy below threshold for 90+ days triggers Landlord recapture right.
due_date: Quarterly occupancy reports due within 15 days of quarter end
penalty_if_missed: Landlord may recapture and re-let up to 30% of the Premises
source_clause: SECTION 14.1: Tenant covenants to continuously occupy and operate its business in not less than eighty-five percent (85%) of the Premises. Failure to maintain minimum occupancy for ninety (90) consecutive days shall constitute a Recapture Event.

description: Tenant must implement and maintain a written data security program compliant with applicable state and federal privacy laws within 60 days of commencement.
due_date: February 28, 2025 — annual recertification by January 31
penalty_if_missed: $25,000 per data breach attributable to Tenant's failure to maintain required security program
source_clause: SECTION 15.2: Tenant shall implement and maintain a comprehensive written information security program that complies with all applicable federal and state data privacy and security laws, including but not limited to CCPA, HIPAA where applicable, and SOC 2 standards.

description: Annual fire suppression system inspection by licensed contractor required. Certificate must be filed with building management by January 31 each year.
due_date: January 31 annually
penalty_if_missed: $3,500 per month until certificate received; Landlord may perform at Tenant's cost plus 25%
source_clause: SECTION 16.1: Tenant shall cause the fire suppression system serving the Premises to be inspected annually by a licensed fire protection contractor and shall deliver a copy of the inspection certificate to Landlord no later than January 31st of each calendar year.

description: Tenant responsible for pro-rata share of building operating expenses (CAM), estimated at $8.50/sq ft annually, reconciled each March 31.
due_date: Monthly estimated payments; annual reconciliation by March 31
penalty_if_missed: Interest at prime rate plus 2% on underpayments; $1,500 administrative fee for late reconciliation
source_clause: SECTION 17.3: Tenant shall pay its proportionate share of Operating Expenses, currently estimated at Eight Dollars and Fifty Cents ($8.50) per rentable square foot per annum, payable monthly. Annual reconciliation statements delivered by March 31st.

description: Tenant must notify Landlord in writing within 48 hours of any casualty, damage, or loss exceeding $5,000 occurring within the Premises.
due_date: Within 48 hours of occurrence
penalty_if_missed: Tenant liable for all consequential damages resulting from delayed notification; potential lease default
source_clause: SECTION 18.1: Tenant shall promptly notify Landlord in writing, within forty-eight (48) hours, of any damage, casualty, or loss occurring within the Premises with an estimated value in excess of Five Thousand Dollars ($5,000).

description: Tenant must participate in building-wide sustainability program and achieve minimum ENERGY STAR score of 75 within 24 months.
due_date: January 1, 2027 — annual progress reports by June 30
penalty_if_missed: $10,000 per year until target achieved; may affect renewal option eligibility
source_clause: SECTION 19.2: Tenant agrees to participate in Landlord's sustainability program and to achieve a minimum ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager score of 75 for the Premises within twenty-four (24) months of the Commencement Date.

description: Tenant must execute and deliver estoppel certificate within 10 business days of Landlord's written request.
due_date: Within 10 business days of each request
penalty_if_missed: Landlord may execute estoppel on Tenant's behalf as attorney-in-fact; $5,000 per day after deadline
source_clause: SECTION 20.1: Within ten (10) business days following written request by Landlord, Tenant shall execute and deliver to Landlord a written estoppel certificate certifying such facts regarding this Lease as Landlord may reasonably request. Failure: $5,000 per day penalty.

description: Tenant must submit quarterly sales reports by the 15th day following each quarter end to support percentage rent calculations.
due_date: April 15, July 15, October 15, January 15
penalty_if_missed: $750 per day late; Landlord may audit Tenant's books at Tenant's expense if reports are more than 30 days late
source_clause: SECTION 21.1: Tenant shall deliver to Landlord within fifteen (15) days after the end of each calendar quarter a written statement showing Gross Sales made during such quarter, certified by Tenant's chief financial officer.

description: Tenant must maintain parking lot in clean condition and ensure no vehicles are stored overnight without prior written approval.
due_date: Ongoing
penalty_if_missed: $250 per vehicle per day for unauthorized overnight storage; towing at Tenant's expense
source_clause: SECTION 22.3: Tenant shall keep the parking areas serving the Premises in a clean and orderly condition. No vehicle shall be stored or left overnight in the parking areas without Landlord's prior written consent.
